title: Doom Seaker [ Katana ]
description: Adds a very cool katana to the game!
body:
# This texture pack requires CIT Resewn!

Although this pack is orignally commissioned by _**Mayonizer**_, it is open for the public to use. This pack simply just contains katana called _Doom Seaker_

**How to get the weapon in game**: Re-name and sword or axe to "doom seaker" in an anvil.

![doom seaker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/946e911081f9d0e479c50578b64417c79c3653ab.png)
